question: Run the Qwen 3 30B math recipe on the Kubernetes cluster as a one-shot RayJob.
ground_truth: The agent loads the launch-nemo-rl skill, identifies the recipe and infra files, validates with nrl-k8s check, and launches with nrl-k8s run --rayjob.
expected_behavior: The agent read launch-nemo-rl/SKILL.md before acting
The agent identified the recipe and matching infra YAML files
The agent ran nrl-k8s check to validate before launching
The agent used nrl-k8s run with --rayjob for ephemeral mode

question: The training job seems stuck. How do I get the logs for the running job?
ground_truth: The agent loads the launch-nemo-rl skill and guides the user through checking status with nrl-k8s status and fetching logs with nrl-k8s job logs.
expected_behavior: The agent read launch-nemo-rl/SKILL.md before acting
The agent used nrl-k8s status to check the cluster state
The agent used nrl-k8s job list and nrl-k8s job logs to fetch driver logs

question: Tear down the training cluster after the run is done.
ground_truth: The agent loads the launch-nemo-rl skill and uses nrl-k8s cluster down to tear down the RayCluster.
expected_behavior: The agent read launch-nemo-rl/SKILL.md before acting
The agent confirmed the run was complete before tearing down
The agent used nrl-k8s cluster down with the appropriate target

question: I want to iterate on this recipe quickly. Launch it in long-lived mode so I can resubmit without recreating the cluster.
ground_truth: The agent loads the launch-nemo-rl skill and uses nrl-k8s run with --raycluster for long-lived mode.
expected_behavior: The agent read launch-nemo-rl/SKILL.md before acting
The agent used --raycluster flag for long-lived mode
The agent explained that re-running reuses the existing cluster
